top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
INNER JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
INNER JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
INNER JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
INNER JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';
